empty.title: No stores yet
empty.desc: Create your first store to start selling.

plan_violation.title: Store hidden: plan limit exceeded
plan_violation.body: This store has been automatically deactivated because it exceeds the number of stores allowed by your current plan. The data is preserved and the store will be reactivated automatically when you upgrade your plan (or buy a +1 store add-on).

create.title: Create a new store
create.name: Store name
create.slug_hint: The public URL for your store (lowercase letters, numbers and dashes only)

public.label: Public
public.desc: Visible to everyone via public URL

stats.title: Commerce Statistics
stats.no_orders_store: No orders found for this store.

coupons.title: Promotional Coupons
coupons.empty: No coupons. Click "New Coupon" to create one.
coupons.empty_store: No coupons for this store. Click "New Coupon" to create one.

dialog.valid_stores_hint: Leave empty to make the coupon valid on all stores

languages.title: Storefront languages
languages.hint: Choose which languages are available in the public catalog
languages.min_one: At least one language must be selected
languages.singleSelectHint: Main language of the store. The current selection drives the language of every public catalog and landing surface.
languages.legacyBannerBody: This store has {{count}} active languages ({{langs}}). Selecting a new language below will reduce the store to a single language and the others will stop being visible in the public catalog. Save changes to confirm.

banner.heading: How global settings work
banner.body: The values below apply to <1>all stores</1> that don't have their own logo or color set. If an individual store configures its own branding, it overrides the global only on that store.

logo.label: Logo
logo.hint: Uploaded here, it appears on every store without its own logo and on the login pages of the customer area.
logo.format_hint: JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG · max 2MB

colors.label: Brand colors
colors.hint: Used as graphic accents on storefronts and in the customer area header.

future.body: Favicon, default email sender, legal footer and other global fields will land here — the data plan is already in place, they just need to be activated when needed.

clear_all.confirm: Remove ALL global settings? Stores without their own branding will revert to the neutral default.

shipping.title: Shipping — {{storeName}}
shipping.description: Configure the shipping options shown to the customer during checkout. They only appear on orders with at least one physical product.

hint.store: Options in this tab appear <1>only</1> at checkout of <2>{{storeName}}</2>.
hint.global: Global options appear at checkout of <1>all</1> stores in your organization, in addition to those specific to each store.

toast.name_required: Every option must have a name.

editor.empty_store: No shipping option configured for this store.
editor.empty_hint: Add at least one option to enable checkout of physical products.
